prompts.prompt: Explain the process of photosynthesis in exactly four sentences.
List the five largest empires in history by land area, with approximate peak sizes in square kilometers.
A farmer has 17 sheep. All but 9 run away. How many sheep does the farmer have left? Show your reasoning step by step.
A self-driving car must choose between hitting one pedestrian or swerving into a wall, injuring its two passengers. Analyze both choices in exactly three sentences each.
Write a Python function called 'flatten' that takes an arbitrarily nested list and returns a flat list of all elements. Include a docstring.
Write a SQL query that finds the top 5 customers by total order value from tables 'customers' (id, name) and 'orders' (id, customer_id, amount). Use standard SQL.
Write a complete story in exactly 50 words about a lighthouse keeper who discovers something unexpected.
Summarize the concept of supply and demand in economics in exactly three bullet points, each one sentence long.
List exactly 7 colors of the rainbow in reverse order, numbered 1 through 7, with each color on its own line.
A train leaves Station A at 60 mph. Another train leaves Station B, 300 miles away, at 90 mph heading toward Station A. How long until they meet? Show all work.
Classify each of these as animal, vegetable, or mineral: quartz, broccoli, platypus, basalt, kelp, coral. Return your answer as a simple table.
Return a JSON object representing a bookstore with 3 books. Each book has title, author, year, and price fields. Return only valid JSON, no other text.
